description: CHECK24 is a German comparison platform for consumer products and services such as insurance, travel, finance, and utilities. Its public web presence for check24.de did not surface general developer integration documentation beyond the MCP endpoint listed in registries.
summary: CHECK24 exposes a public MCP server at https://chatgpt.bot.check24.de/v4.0/mcp/stream; no public developer-facing HTTP, GraphQL, or CLI integration surfaces were found on check24.de.
